prestazioni: Engine: Twin-turbocharged 3.0L VG30DETT (7000 RPM redline, forged internals) with a Tomei 272°/272° camshaft upgrade, Tomei Type-S titanium retainers, and Tomei M82 valve springs for high-RPM stability.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbochargers (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifolds by HKS, paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valves.

Fuel System: Nismo 550cc/min fuel injectors (PN: 16600-21U00) with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulator, and custom -8AN braided lines by Earl’s Performance for high-flow fuel delivery.
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber overfenders (hand-laid by Seibon Carbon) to fit 10.5-inch front and 12-inch rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels (18x10.5 +15 front, 18x12 +20 rear).
Aero: Custom front splitter by Rocket Bunny (Z32-specific, 3-piece carbon fiber) with a Cusco Type-RS rear wing (adjustable 3-position angle, 1500mm width) for balanced downforce at 150+ mph.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FRP shell, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, Nismo 320mm steering wheel (thick-grip suede), and a Defi BF Advance multi-gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod.
